researchInterests.tagline: Organic chemistry as foundation, computational tools as extension, AI as leverage
researchInterests.summary: I have a sustained academic interest in organic synthesis methodology, and I am also deeply interested in how LLMs, agent workflows, and deep learning can be applied to chemical research. My long-term goal is to bridge my chemical engineering training with computational and AI capabilities, focusing on the intersection of computational chemistry and AI-assisted organic synthesis.

areas.name: Organic Synthesis Methodology
areas.note: Ongoing study of Clayden, March and related texts; focus on synthetic strategy and reaction mechanisms

areas.name: Computational Chemistry / AI-Assisted Synthesis
areas.note: Core research interest — reaction prediction, retrosynthetic planning, molecular property prediction

areas.name: LLMs + Agent Workflows
areas.note: Exploring LLM applications in literature retrieval, experiment proposal generation, and research knowledge management

areas.name: Deep Learning Fundamentals
areas.note: Studying neural network basics, interested in graph neural networks for molecular representation learning
